Name: Flint Pilum
Description: Requires a Pilum Quiver to be thrown.
DescriptionEn: Requires a Pilum Quiver to be thrown.
DescriptionZhHans: 需装备一只重标枪袋才能投掷。
DescriptionZhHant: 需裝備一隻重標槍袋才能投擲。

Name: Radiant Pilum Shaft
Description: A divine weapon, separated into three parts. This must be one of them.
DescriptionEn: A divine weapon, separated into three parts. This must be one of them.
DescriptionZhHans: 传说有一把被分成了三个部分的神圣武器，这肯定是其中一个部分。
DescriptionZhHant: 傳說有一把被分成了三個部分的神聖武器，這一定是其中一個部分。

Name: Radiant Pilum Shank
Description: A divine weapon, separated into three parts. This must be one of them.
DescriptionEn: A divine weapon, separated into three parts. This must be one of them.
DescriptionZhHans: 传说有一把被分成了三个部分的神圣武器，这肯定是其中一个部分。
DescriptionZhHant: 傳說有一把被分成了三個部分的神聖武器，這一定是其中一個部分。

Name: Radiant Pilum Tip
Description: A divine weapon, separated into three parts. This must be one of them.
DescriptionEn: A divine weapon, separated into three parts. This must be one of them.
DescriptionZhHans: 传说有一把被分成了三个部分的神圣武器，这肯定是其中一个部分。
DescriptionZhHant: 傳說有一把被分成了三個部分的神聖武器，這一定是其中一個部分。

Name: Sancta Trinita Pilum
Description: The writing around the handle tells a story of how this weapon was forged by the hands of three mighty brothers. Like their spirit, the pilum was indestructible.
DescriptionEn: The writing around the handle tells a story of how this weapon was forged by the hands of three mighty brothers. Like their spirit, the pilum was indestructible.
DescriptionZhHans: 标枪杠上的铭文讲述了这把剑的起源——由传奇三兄弟所铸，此枪就像他们的灵魂一样，是不可被摧毁的存在。
DescriptionZhHant: 槍身上的銘文講述了這把標槍的起源——由傳奇三兄弟所鑄，此槍就像他們的靈魂一樣，是不可被摧毀的存在。

Name: Druid Robes
Description: These robes brought them closer to nature, but also let them hide in it.
DescriptionEn: These robes brought them closer to nature, but also let them hide in it.
DescriptionZhHans: 这些长袍使德鲁伊更贴近自然，也让他们得以隐匿其中。
DescriptionZhHant: 這些長袍使德魯伊更貼近自然，也讓他們得以隱匿其中。

Name: Druid Hood
Description: The druids verdant disguises avoided the Empire's gaze for a long time.
DescriptionEn: The druids verdant disguises avoided the Empire's gaze for a long time.
DescriptionZhHans: 德鲁伊的迷彩伪装帮助他们长年躲避帝国的追捕。
DescriptionZhHant: 德魯伊的迷彩偽裝幫助他們長年躲避帝國的追捕。

Name: Druid Sandals
Description: Secluded deep in the forests, they worshipped sacrilegious gods.
DescriptionEn: Secluded deep in the forests, they worshipped sacrilegious gods.
DescriptionZhHans: 德鲁伊在深林中幽居，崇拜着亵渎的邪神。
DescriptionZhHant: 德魯伊在深林中幽居，崇拜著褻瀆的邪神。

Name: Feathered Armor
Description: Ancient wisdom courses through the feathers of this armour, like a strong gust of wind.
DescriptionEn: Ancient wisdom courses through the feathers of this armour, like a strong gust of wind.
DescriptionZhHans: 古老的智慧如劲风般在甲胄的羽毛间流淌。
DescriptionZhHant: 古老的智慧如勁風般在甲胄的羽毛間流淌。

Name: Feathered Hood
Description: Your journey has begun. The eyes of the world are upon you.
DescriptionEn: Your journey has begun. The eyes of the world are upon you.
DescriptionZhHans: 你的征程已然开启，世人的目光聚焦于你。
DescriptionZhHant: 你的征程已然開啟，世人的目光聚焦於你。

Name: Feathered Boots
Description: Minerva's Guardian, the owl of wisdom, tainted by some foul force. Despicable.
DescriptionEn: Minerva's Guardian, the owl of wisdom, tainted by some foul force. Despicable.
DescriptionZhHans: 智慧的猫头鹰，本应是密涅瓦的守护者，却被某种邪恶力量所腐化。简直可憎！
DescriptionZhHant: 智慧的貓頭鷹，本應是密涅瓦的守護者，卻被某種邪惡力量所腐化。簡直可憎！

Name: Fossor Robes
Description: Whether the cause or not, the gravediggers were blamed for the rise of the fallen.
DescriptionEn: Whether the cause or not, the gravediggers were blamed for the rise of the fallen.
DescriptionZhHans: 无论真相如何，掘墓者们都被归咎为亡者复苏的罪魁祸首。
DescriptionZhHant: 無論真相如何，掘墓者們都被歸咎為亡者復甦的罪魁禍首。

Name: Fossor Mask
Description: Somewhat protects from the smell of rot. Less so against angry mobs.
DescriptionEn: Somewhat protects from the smell of rot. Less so against angry mobs.
DescriptionZhHans: 一定程度上抵御腐臭气味，但对愤怒的生物作用有限
DescriptionZhHant: 一定程度上抵禦腐臭氣味，但對憤怒的生物作用有限

Name: Fossor Boots
Description: As the fallen rose, they were the first to see the executioners axe.
DescriptionEn: As the fallen rose, they were the first to see the executioners axe.
DescriptionZhHans: 当亡者复苏时，是他们最先见识了刽子手的斧刃。
DescriptionZhHant: 當亡者復蘇時，是他們最先見識到劊子手的斧刃。

Name: Graverobber's Tunic
Description: Plenty of trinkets and baubles to find in a world that doesn't need them anymore.
DescriptionEn: Plenty of trinkets and baubles to find in a world that doesn't need them anymore.
DescriptionZhHans: 数不尽的首饰和宝物等着盗墓贼收入囊中，毕竟死者的世界却不需要这些东西。
DescriptionZhHant: 數不清的首飾和寶物等著盜墓賊收入囊中，畢竟死者的世界卻不需要這些東西。

Name: Graverobbers' Cowl
Description: While lucrative, not the most honorable of professions.
DescriptionEn: While lucrative, not the most honorable of professions.
DescriptionZhHans: 盗墓贼虽收入可观，却并非什么体面职业。
DescriptionZhHant: 盜墓賊雖收入可觀，卻並非什麼體面職業。

Name: Graverobber's Boots
Description: Robbing graves these days isn't as easy as it used to be.
DescriptionEn: Robbing graves these days isn't as easy as it used to be.
DescriptionZhHans: 如今，盗墓这活计可不像以往那般容易了。
DescriptionZhHant: 如今，盜墓這行可不像以往那般容易了。

Name: Flamen Volcanalis Robes
Description: Surrounded and cornered, their assistants became their executioners.
DescriptionEn: Surrounded and cornered, their assistants became their executioners.
DescriptionZhHans: 逼入绝境后，他们的助手竟成了杀死他们的刽子手。
DescriptionZhHant: 逼入絕境後，他們的助手竟變成了殺死他們的劊子手。

Name: Flamen Volcanalis Hood
Description: No one knew the methods Vulcan's priesthood used to breathe life into their sacrilegious creations.
DescriptionEn: No one knew the methods Vulcan's priesthood used to breathe life into their sacrilegious creations.
DescriptionZhHans: 无人得知伏尔甘的神官们究竟是如何一直专注于开发那些亵渎神明的发明创造的。
DescriptionZhHant: 無人得知伏爾甘的神官們究竟是如何一直專注於開發那些褻瀆神明的發明創造的。

Name: Flamen Volcanalis Boots
Description: They claimed Vulcan blessed them, with outfits made to resist heat from their grand forges.
DescriptionEn: They claimed Vulcan blessed them, with outfits made to resist heat from their grand forges.
DescriptionZhHans: 他们宣称受到了伏尔甘神的赐福，得到了能抵御巨大熔炉高温的装备。
DescriptionZhHant: 他們宣稱受到了伏爾甘神的賜福，得到了能抵禦巨大熔爐高溫的裝備。

Name: Mercury's Helmet
Description: The famous winged helmet, depicted on top of Mercury's head at all times, now within your grasp.
DescriptionEn: The famous winged helmet, depicted on top of Mercury's head at all times, now within your grasp.
DescriptionZhHans: 墨丘利标志性的飞翼头盔，现在你也值得拥有，只要你有第纳尔。
DescriptionZhHant: 墨丘利標誌性的飛翼頭盔，現在你也值得擁有，只要你有第納爾。

Name: Occultist's Vestments
Description: The followers of Orcus resided in rural areas, hidden away from the eyes of society.
DescriptionEn: The followers of Orcus resided in rural areas, hidden away from the eyes of society.
DescriptionZhHans: 奥迦斯的邪教徒隐居在乡野，远离市井大众的耳目。
DescriptionZhHant: The followers of Orcus resided in rural areas, hidden away from the eyes of society.

Name: Occultist's Hood
Description: Worn by cultists of Orcus during their rites.
DescriptionEn: Worn by cultists of Orcus during their rites.
DescriptionZhHans: 奥迦斯的邪教徒在举行仪式时穿戴的兜帽。
DescriptionZhHant: 奧迦斯的邪教徒在舉行儀式時穿戴的兜帽。

Name: Occultist's Legwraps
Description: The stones in their temples are worn down by the soles.
DescriptionEn: The stones in their temples are worn down by the soles.
DescriptionZhHans: 他们神庙的地板都要被鞋底给磨平了。
DescriptionZhHant: 他們神廟的地板都要被鞋底磨平了。

Name: Pontifex Vestments
Description: Adorned robes, immaculately sewn for the high priest of the Roman empire.
DescriptionEn: Adorned robes, immaculately sewn for the high priest of the Roman empire.
DescriptionZhHans: 这件华丽的礼袍为罗马大祭司所御，严丝合缝，针脚无暇。
DescriptionZhHant: Adorned robes, immaculately sewn for the high priest of the Roman empire.

Name: Pontifex Headpiece
Description: A decorated laurel, befitting the most important position in the Roman religion.
DescriptionEn: A decorated laurel, befitting the most important position in the Roman religion.
DescriptionZhHans: 能配上这副华美的桂冠之人，乃是罗马教宗之尊。
DescriptionZhHant: A decorated laurel, befitting the most important position in the Roman religion.

Name: Pontifex Sandals
Description: Immaculate sandals for parading the streets of Rome, delivering the will of the gods. |
DescriptionEn: Immaculate sandals for parading the streets of Rome, delivering the will of the gods. |
DescriptionZhHans: 一双方便行走布道、传播众神旨意的完美凉鞋。 |
DescriptionZhHant: Immaculate sandals for parading the streets of Rome, delivering the will of the gods. |

Name: Root Boots
Description: The elusive druids used boots like these to easier physically connect themselves with nature, sometimes not moving from the same spot for hours during prayers.
DescriptionEn: The elusive druids used boots like these to easier physically connect themselves with nature, sometimes not moving from the same spot for hours during prayers.
DescriptionZhHans: 神出鬼没的德鲁伊们穿着这种靴子以使自己更加能够与自然接触，有时会一动不动地原地祈祷数个时辰。
DescriptionZhHant: 神出鬼沒的德魯伊們穿著這種靴子以使自己更加能夠與自然接觸，有時會一動不動地原地祈禱數個時辰。

Name: Rex Sacrorum Vestments
Description: Adorned robes, immaculately sewn for the high priest of the Roman empire.
DescriptionEn: Adorned robes, immaculately sewn for the high priest of the Roman empire.
DescriptionZhHans: 这件华丽的礼袍为罗马大祭司所御，严丝合缝，针脚无暇。
DescriptionZhHant: Adorned robes, immaculately sewn for the high priest of the Roman empire.

Name: Rex Sacrorum Headpiece
Description: A decorated laurel, befitting the most important position in the Roman religion.
DescriptionEn: A decorated laurel, befitting the most important position in the Roman religion.
DescriptionZhHans: 能配上这副华美的桂冠之人，乃是罗马教宗之尊。
DescriptionZhHant: A decorated laurel, befitting the most important position in the Roman religion.

Name: Rex Sacrorum Sandals
Description: Immaculate sandals for parading the streets of Rome, delivering the will of the gods.
DescriptionEn: Immaculate sandals for parading the streets of Rome, delivering the will of the gods.
DescriptionZhHans: 一双方便行走布道、传播众神旨意的完美凉鞋。
DescriptionZhHant: Immaculate sandals for parading the streets of Rome, delivering the will of the gods.

Name: Tectonic Armor
Description: Wearing this armour makes you feel like the weight of the world is on your shoulders.
DescriptionEn: Wearing this armour makes you feel like the weight of the world is on your shoulders.
DescriptionZhHans: 穿上这身铠甲，你会感觉肩负着整个世界的重担。
DescriptionZhHant: 穿上這身鎧甲，你會感覺肩負著整個世界的重擔。

Name: Tectonic Helmet
Description: What could be behind the Cyclop's madness? The same force that causes the dead to rise?
DescriptionEn: What could be behind the Cyclop's madness? The same force that causes the dead to rise?
DescriptionZhHans: 独眼巨人暴走的背后究竟隐藏着什么？是那让亡者复苏的同一股力量吗？
DescriptionZhHant: What could be behind the Cyclop's madness? The same force that causes the dead to rise?

Name: Tectonic Boots
Description: These massive creatures were said to be the builders of the great walls of Rome.
DescriptionEn: These massive creatures were said to be the builders of the great walls of Rome.
DescriptionZhHans: 传说这些庞然巨物正是罗马城墙的建造者。
DescriptionZhHant: 傳說這些龐然巨物正是羅馬城牆的建造者。

Name: Velites Armor
Description: Light infantry tunic, worn by the poorest soldiers.
DescriptionEn: Light infantry tunic, worn by the poorest soldiers.
DescriptionZhHans: 贫苦士兵穿戴的轻步兵短袍。
DescriptionZhHant: 貧苦士兵穿戴的輕步兵短袍。

Name: Wolf Cowl
Description: Worn by young soldiers to display their bravery.
DescriptionEn: Worn by young soldiers to display their bravery.
DescriptionZhHans: 年轻士兵佩戴此物以彰显勇气。
DescriptionZhHant: 年輕士兵佩戴此物以彰顯勇氣。

Name: Velites Sandals
Description: Light leather sandals, suitable for the fast movement of a Velites.
DescriptionEn: Light leather sandals, suitable for the fast movement of a Velites.
DescriptionZhHans: 轻便的皮质凉鞋，适合让轻步兵快速移动。
DescriptionZhHant: 輕便的皮質涼鞋，適合讓輕步兵快速移動。

Name: Vigiles Manium Chestpiece
Description: Hired to protect the wealthy families tombs from the living, they instead found themselves protecting the living from the dead.
DescriptionEn: Hired to protect the wealthy families tombs from the living, they instead found themselves protecting the living from the dead.
DescriptionZhHans: 他们受雇保护富裕家族的陵墓免受生者侵扰，却意外肩负起守护生者免遭亡灵侵袭的使命。
DescriptionZhHant: 他們受雇保護富裕家族的陵墓免受生者侵擾，卻意外肩負起守護生者免遭亡靈侵襲的使命。

Name: Vigiles Manium Helmet
Description: The first line of defence against the undead onslaught, and the first to fall.
DescriptionEn: The first line of defence against the undead onslaught, and the first to fall.
DescriptionZhHans: 抵御不死生物大军的第一道防线，也是最先牺牲的战士们。
DescriptionZhHant: 抵禦不死生物大軍的第一道防線，也是最先犧牲的戰士們。

Name: Vigiles Manium Greaves
Description: Today all that remains of these noble soldiers is their blood-stained armors scattered across the many tombs and graves.
DescriptionEn: Today all that remains of these noble soldiers is their blood-stained armors scattered across the many tombs and graves.
DescriptionZhHans: 如今，这些高贵战士仅存的痕迹，便是散落在无数坟墓与墓穴间的血染铠甲。
DescriptionZhHant: 如今，這些高貴戰士僅存的痕跡，便是散落在無數墳墓與墓穴間的血染鎧甲。

Name: Winged Boots
Description: A symbol for speed, efficiency, and commerce, mostly associated with Mercury.
DescriptionEn: A symbol for speed, efficiency, and commerce, mostly associated with Mercury.
DescriptionZhHans: 这双飞鞋就是速度、效率以及贸易的象征。墨丘利代言，品质保证。
DescriptionZhHant: 這雙飛鞋就是速度、效率以及貿易的象徵。墨丘利代言，品質保證。

Name: Diamond Axe
Description: Found near a strange square structure made from obsidian.
DescriptionEn: Found near a strange square structure made from obsidian.
DescriptionZhHans: 在一座由黑曜石构成的奇异方形结构附近中发现
DescriptionZhHant: 在一座由黑曜石構成的奇異方形結構附近中發現

Name: Cape of Victoria
Description: Disclaimer: wearing this cape does not improve your aim.
DescriptionEn: Disclaimer: wearing this cape does not improve your aim.
DescriptionZhHans: 免责声明：佩戴此斗篷并不能提高你的准头。
DescriptionZhHant: 免責聲明：佩戴此斗篷並不能提高你的準頭。

Name: Cape of Björn
Description: Oh gods, now he's stuck in a cape making factory too!?
DescriptionEn: Oh gods, now he's stuck in a cape making factory too!?
DescriptionZhHans: 天呐，他该不会这回是被困在披风制造工厂里了吧？
DescriptionZhHant: 天呐，他該不會這次是被困在披風製造工廠裡了吧？

Name: Cape of the Immovable Object
Description: Pray that there is no unstoppable force.
DescriptionEn: Pray that there is no unstoppable force.
DescriptionZhHans: 还是祈祷世间没有“无坚不摧”之力吧。
DescriptionZhHant: 還是祈禱世間沒有「無堅不摧」之力吧。

Name: Keeper's Pickaxe of the Core
Description: Discovered deep underground near a peculiar structure.
DescriptionEn: Discovered deep underground near a peculiar structure.
DescriptionZhHans: 在一座古怪建筑附近的地下深处中发现
DescriptionZhHant: 在一座古怪建築附近的地下深處中發現

Name: Björn's Potion
Description: Help! I'm stuck in a potion making factory!
DescriptionEn: Help! I'm stuck in a potion making factory!
DescriptionZhHans: 救命！我被困在药水制造工厂里了！
DescriptionZhHant: 救命！我被困在藥水製造工廠裡了！

Name: Arjeploger 2000
Description: Forged in the furnaces of the north.
DescriptionEn: Forged in the furnaces of the north.
DescriptionZhHans: 在北方的熔炉中锻造而成
DescriptionZhHant: 在北方的熔爐中鍛造而成

Name: Ring of Victoria
Description: I CAN hit arrows, I just choose not to so you have a chance.
DescriptionEn: I CAN hit arrows, I just choose not to so you have a chance.
DescriptionZhHans: 我又不是射不中，只是让你一把而已。
DescriptionZhHant: 我又不是射不中，只是讓讓你而已。

Name: Sam's Ring 2 - De Bicus de Dicus
NameEn: Sam's Ring 2 - De Bicus de Dicus
NameZhHans: 山姆的戒指 2 - 降智乌鸦
NameZhHant: 山姆的戒指 2 - 降智烏鴉

Name: Signet of Demo Completion
Description: Thank you for playing our demo! We are currently working on adding more biomes and content. If you enjoyed the demo so far, consider wishlisting the game on Steam. | You can also let us know in our Discord channel about any issues or feedback you have. | From Beartwigs
DescriptionEn: Thank you for playing our demo! We are currently working on adding more biomes and content. If you enjoyed the demo so far, consider wishlisting the game on Steam. | You can also let us know in our Discord channel about any issues or feedback you have. | From Beartwigs
DescriptionZhHans: 感谢您体验我们的试玩版游戏！我们正在努力开发更多的生态群系和内容。如果您喜欢当前的试玩，请考虑将游戏加入Steam愿望单。您也可以通过我们的QQ频道反馈问题或建议。 | Beartwigs 敬上
DescriptionZhHant: 感謝您體驗我們的試玩版遊戲！我們正在努力開發更多的生態群系和內容。如果您喜歡現版本的試玩，請考慮將遊戲加入Steam願望單。您也可以透過我們的QQ頻道回饋問題或建議。 | Beartwigs 敬上

Name: Björn's Ring
Description: Help! I am stuck in an item description factory!
DescriptionEn: Help! I am stuck in an item description factory!
DescriptionZhHans: 救命！我被困在物品描述工厂里了！
DescriptionZhHant: 救命！我被困在物品描述工廠裡了！

Name: Tubilian Productions Top Security Insignia
NameZhHans: 图比里安出品的顶级安全徽章
NameZhHant: 圖比裡安出品的頂級安全徽章

Name: Ash-covered Tablet
Description: The aggressive siblings to the potmen seem bent on destruction. What could have caused their ire?
DescriptionEn: The aggressive siblings to the potmen seem bent on destruction. What could have caused their ire?
DescriptionZhHans: 这群陶人的远方亲戚更为凶狠，似乎非常执着于杀戮。是什么原因让它们如此暴躁？
DescriptionZhHant: 這群陶人的遠方親戚更為兇狠，似乎非常執著於殺戮。是什麼原因讓它們如此暴躁？

Name: Citizen Level Up
Description: A strange power lies dormant in this idol. You feel a powerful gaze upon you.
DescriptionEn: A strange power lies dormant in this idol. You feel a powerful gaze upon you.
DescriptionZhHans: 这尊神像中蕴藏着一股奇异的力量。你感觉到自己正被一股强大的存在注视着。
DescriptionZhHant: 這尊神像中蘊藏著一股奇異的力量。你感覺到自己正被一股強大的存在注視著。

Name: Ancient Clay Tablet
Description: The origins of the Potmen are unknown, and so are their apparent attraction to resources.
DescriptionEn: The origins of the Potmen are unknown, and so are their apparent attraction to resources.
DescriptionZhHans: 陶人的起源无人知晓，它们执着于抢掠资源的态度也令人匪夷所思。
DescriptionZhHant: The origins of the Potmen are unknown, and so are their apparent attraction to resources.

Name: Granite Effigy
Description: Tasked with creating the walls of Rome, the Cyclops sought to achieve its goal by any means necessary. Banished to the underground for its recklessness, the task was completed.
DescriptionEn: Tasked with creating the walls of Rome, the Cyclops sought to achieve its goal by any means necessary. Banished to the underground for its recklessness, the task was completed.
DescriptionZhHans: 为了完成修筑罗马的城墙的任务，这只独眼巨人不择手段，最终因其鲁莽本性而被放逐于地底之狱，然而它的任务还是完成了。
DescriptionZhHant: 為了完成修築羅馬的城牆的任務，這只獨眼巨人不擇手段，最終因其魯莽本性而被放逐於地底之獄，然而它的任務還是完成了。

Name: Bottle of Hot Spring Water
Description: Blessed by the Nitrodi nymphs, the hot springs have the capability to mend wounds.
DescriptionEn: Blessed by the Nitrodi nymphs, the hot springs have the capability to mend wounds.
DescriptionZhHans: 经过纯洁女仙—妮特罗蒂的祝福，这份温泉水有着回春敛创的功效。
DescriptionZhHant: 經過純潔女仙—妮特羅蒂的祝福，這份溫泉水有著回春斂創的功效。

Name: Feathered Effigy
Description: The great owl has lost its connection to its master, leaving behind nothing but a feral, ravenous fury. For a beast consumed by such madness, there is only one cure.
DescriptionEn: The great owl has lost its connection to its master, leaving behind nothing but a feral, ravenous fury. For a beast consumed by such madness, there is only one cure.
DescriptionZhHans: 那只巨猫头鹰早已断绝了与其主人的羁绊，沦为了一头野兽，眼里只有狂野、贪婪和愤怒。对于这种暴走的禽兽，救赎的办法只有一个。
DescriptionZhHant: 那只巨貓頭鷹早已斷絕了與其主人的羈絆並淪為一頭野獸，眼裡只有狂野、貪婪和憤怒。對於這種暴走的禽獸，救贖的辦法只有一個。

Name: Trace of Suculae
Description: A trace of the nymphs of rain, turned to stars by Jupiter.
DescriptionEn: A trace of the nymphs of rain, turned to stars by Jupiter.
DescriptionZhHans: 雨泽女仙的一缕痕迹，被朱庇特升上天穹，化为星辰。
DescriptionZhHant: 雨澤女仙的一縷痕跡，被朱庇特升上天穹，化為星辰。

Name: Venus' Perfume
Description: Used by Venus to avoid conflicts, this perfume is so strong and delightful that no foe dare raise arms.
DescriptionEn: Used by Venus to avoid conflicts, this perfume is so strong and delightful that no foe dare raise arms.
DescriptionZhHans: 维纳斯用以消弭战祸的香水。馥烈怡人，无人闻后还欲刀兵相向。
DescriptionZhHant: 維納斯用以消弭戰禍的香水。馥烈怡人，無人聞後還欲刀兵相向。

Name: Under Construction
Description: Hello! Whatever you're discovering right now, it's still being developed! Things may be weird or broken here, but enjoy the visit anyways! | -Vicky
DescriptionEn: Hello! Whatever you're discovering right now, it's still being developed! Things may be weird or broken here, but enjoy the visit anyways! | -Vicky
DescriptionZhHans: 您好！您目前体验到的内容仍在开发阶段，过程中可能会出现异常或未完成之处，但还是感谢您玩到这里并且希望您目前游玩体验愉快哦！—— Vicky
DescriptionZhHant: 您好！您目前體驗到的內容仍在開發階段，過程中可能會出現異常或未完成之處，但還是感謝您玩到這裡並且希望您目前遊玩體驗愉快哦！—— Vicky

Name: Ambrosia
Description: This cloudlike food is consumed by the gods.
DescriptionEn: This cloudlike food is consumed by the gods.
DescriptionZhHans: 这份玄幻如云的美食只有神祇才能享有。
DescriptionZhHant: 這份玄幻如雲的美食只有神祇才能享用。

Name: Strange crab Meat
Description: Used as a material in potion-making.
DescriptionEn: Used as a material in potion-making.
DescriptionZhHans: 用于熬制药水的材料。
DescriptionZhHant: 用於熬製藥水的材料。

Name: Berry Crostata
Description: A delightful tart, filled with creamy cheese and berries.
DescriptionEn: A delightful tart, filled with creamy cheese and berries.
DescriptionZhHans: 一份香甜可口的果挞，奶香浓郁，浆果清甜。
DescriptionZhHant: A delightful tart, filled with creamy cheese and berries.

Name: Delectable Platter
Description: A wide spread of the creatures of the world, grilled to perfection.
DescriptionEn: A wide spread of the creatures of the world, grilled to perfection.
DescriptionZhHans: 拼盘里满是来自各地的山珍海味，火候烧得刚刚好。
DescriptionZhHant: 拼盤裡是來自各地的山珍海味，火候燒得剛剛好。

Name: Dulcia Domestica
Description: Sweet stuffed dates, filled with nuts and honey.
DescriptionEn: Sweet stuffed dates, filled with nuts and honey.
DescriptionZhHans: 内馅为坚果与蜂蜜的甜酿椰枣。
DescriptionZhHant: 內餡為堅果與蜂蜜的甜釀椰棗。

Name: Emperor's Salad
Description: A collection of nature's bounties.
DescriptionEn: A collection of nature's bounties.
DescriptionZhHans: 一份大自然的丰饶甄选。
DescriptionZhHant: A collection of nature's bounties.

Name: Fruit Salad
Description: Like your journey, it is a mix of all experiences across the world, with a drizzle of garum on top.
DescriptionEn: Like your journey, it is a mix of all experiences across the world, with a drizzle of garum on top.
DescriptionZhHans: 果盘里满是辛酸滋味，还有一丁点美味鱼露作陪，就如你的冒险旅途一般。
DescriptionZhHant: 果盤裡滿是辛酸滋味，還有一點點美味魚露作陪，就像你的冒險旅途一樣。

Name: Globi
Description: Fried dough balls from cheese and semolina, coated in honey.
DescriptionEn: Fried dough balls from cheese and semolina, coated in honey.
DescriptionZhHans: 用奶酪和粗粒小麦粉制成的油炸面球，外裹蜂蜜。
DescriptionZhHant: 用起司和粗粒小麥粉製成的油炸面球，外裹蜂蜜。

Name: Gustum de Praecoquis
Description: Apricots cooked in a sauce of mint, garum, and honey.
DescriptionEn: Apricots cooked in a sauce of mint, garum, and honey.
DescriptionZhHans: 以薄荷、鱼露与蜂蜜调制的酱汁烹煮的杏子。
DescriptionZhHant: 以薄荷、魚露與蜂蜜調製的醬汁烹煮的杏子。

Name: Isicia Marina
Description: Crab cakes served with salad and a delicious garum dressing.
DescriptionEn: Crab cakes served with salad and a delicious garum dressing.
DescriptionZhHans: 蟹肉饼配沙拉，佐以美味的鱼露汁
DescriptionZhHant: 蟹肉餅配沙拉，佐以美味的魚露汁

Name: Libum
Description: A sweet and soft cake served with a drizzle of honey.
DescriptionEn: A sweet and soft cake served with a drizzle of honey.
DescriptionZhHans: 一种淋上蜂蜜的甜软糕点
DescriptionZhHant: 一種淋上蜂蜜的甜軟糕點。

Name: Isicia Omentata
Description: Meat, wine-soaked bread, and garum, rolled up and fried in a pan.
DescriptionEn: Meat, wine-soaked bread, and garum, rolled up and fried in a pan.
DescriptionZhHans: 将肉、浸泡过葡萄酒的面包和鱼露卷在一起，在平底锅中煎制而成。
DescriptionZhHant: 將肉、浸泡過葡萄酒的麵包和魚露卷在一起，在平底鍋中煎制而成。

Name: Minutal Ex Praecoquis
Description: A hearty stew made from meat, fish, veggies, and apricot.
DescriptionEn: A hearty stew made from meat, fish, veggies, and apricot.
DescriptionZhHans: 用肉类、鱼鲜、蔬菜和杏肉熬制的丰盛炖菜。
DescriptionZhHant: 用肉類、魚鮮、蔬菜和杏肉熬制的豐盛燉菜。

Name: Minutal Matianum
Description: A hearty stew made from pork and apples.
DescriptionEn: A hearty stew made from pork and apples.
DescriptionZhHans: 用猪肉和苹果熬制的丰盛炖菜。
DescriptionZhHant: 用豬肉和蘋果熬制的豐盛燉菜。

Name: Minutal Vulcanum
Description: A spicy stew, filled with the bounty of the volcano.
DescriptionEn: A spicy stew, filled with the bounty of the volcano.
DescriptionZhHans: 一份火山风味的辛辣炖汤。
DescriptionZhHant: 一份火山風味的辛辣燉湯。

Name: Moretum and Bread
Description: A type of cheese spread, eaten with a slice of bread.
DescriptionEn: A type of cheese spread, eaten with a slice of bread.
DescriptionZhHans: 一种奶酪抹酱，配面包片食用
DescriptionZhHant: 一種起司抹醬，配麵包片食用

Name: Mushroom Skewer
Description: Perfectly grilled mushrooms, served on a spit.
DescriptionEn: Perfectly grilled mushrooms, served on a spit.
DescriptionZhHans: 一串美味的蘑菇，360°黄金火候。
DescriptionZhHant: Perfectly grilled mushrooms, served on a spit.

Name: Patina de Malis
Description: A sweet and sour spiced apple pudding.
DescriptionEn: A sweet and sour spiced apple pudding.
DescriptionZhHans: 酸甜口味的苹果布丁。
DescriptionZhHant: 酸甜口味的蘋果布丁。

Name: Patina de Piris

DescriptionEn: A fresh pear pudding, topped with pepper corns.

DescriptionZhHant: 灑滿胡椒粒的梨子布丁。

DescriptionEn: Phoenix meat fried with olives in a sauce of spices, honey, dates, and garum.

DescriptionZhHant: 一份鳳凰肉伴著橄欖，佐著各類香料、蜂蜜、棗果以及魚露的「家常」小炒。

Name: Pinsa
Description: A variety of ingredients, spread out on a dough and cooked in an oven.
DescriptionEn: A variety of ingredients, spread out on a dough and cooked in an oven.
DescriptionZhHans: 满载各种配料，在炉子里焙制而成的薄饼美食。
DescriptionZhHant: 滿載各種配料，在爐子裡焙制而成的薄餅美食。

Name: Salamander Skewer
Description: Spicy Salamander cooked with herbs, roasted over lava.
DescriptionEn: Spicy Salamander cooked with herbs, roasted over lava.
DescriptionZhHans: 蝾螈肉配上香草的香辣组合，用熔岩之火精心烘烤。
DescriptionZhHant: 蠑螈肉配上香草的香辣組合，用熔岩之火精心烘烤。

Name: Scorpion Skewers
Description: Juicy scorpion meat glazed with apricots.
DescriptionEn: Juicy scorpion meat glazed with apricots.
DescriptionZhHans: 涂着杏仁蜜汁烤熟的蝎子肉，鲜美又多汁。
DescriptionZhHant: 塗著杏仁蜜汁烤熟的蠍子肉，鮮美又多汁。

Name: Barrek's Bluntness

DescriptionEn: These gloves have withstood the most violent of confrontations.
DescriptionZhHans: 这副手套经受过最激烈的对抗。
DescriptionZhHant: 這副手套承受過最激烈的對抗。

Name: Ring of Power

DescriptionEn: After all, why shouldn't you keep it?
DescriptionZhHans: 说到底，干嘛不留着它呢？
DescriptionZhHant: 說到底，幹嘛不留著它呢？

DescriptionEn: Used for transporting multiple resources at once.

DescriptionZhHant: 可讓玩家被撿起！

DescriptionEn: Used for creating declarations of war against the trespassers of Rome.
DescriptionZhHans: 用于制作针对特定一类进犯罗马之敌的宣战书。
DescriptionZhHant: 用於製作針對特定一類進犯羅馬之敵的宣戰書。

DescriptionZhHans: 用于建造建筑物。
DescriptionZhHant: 用於建造建築物。

Name: Orcus Blood

DescriptionEn: A vile concoction brewed by cultists of Orcus to protect themselves against The Fallen hordes.
DescriptionZhHans: 奥迦斯的邪教徒们为了抵御亡灵大军所熬制出的一种浑浊私酿。
DescriptionZhHant: 奧迦斯的邪教徒們為了抵禦亡靈大軍所熬制出的一種渾濁私釀。

Name: Crystallized Blood
Description: The crystallized blood from a god, also known as "Sanguis Celeste."
DescriptionEn: The crystallized blood from a god, also known as "Sanguis Celeste."
DescriptionZhHans: 一位神祇所流之血结晶而成，被誉为“天界之血”。
DescriptionZhHant: The crystallized blood from a god, also known as "Sanguis Celeste."

Name: The Moonstring
Description: The glowing string is said to be made from the glow of the moon, granted as a gift from a father to his daughter as she came of age.
DescriptionEn: The glowing string is said to be made from the glow of the moon, granted as a gift from a father to his daughter as she came of age.
DescriptionZhHans: 传说这根发光的弓弦乃是一位神灵父亲从月光中所抽出，作为给自己女儿的成年之礼。
DescriptionZhHant: 傳說這根發光的弓弦乃是一位神靈父親從月光中所抽出，作為給自己女兒的成年之禮。

Name: Amor Redivivus
Description: This perfume is said to capture the moment when two souls connect with each other.
DescriptionEn: This perfume is said to capture the moment when two souls connect with each other.
DescriptionZhHans: 传说这瓶香水承载着两个相恋的魂灵紧紧缠绕在一起的美好瞬间。
DescriptionZhHant: This perfume is said to capture the moment when two souls connect with each other.

Name: Phoenix Ash Sample
Description: A smoldering pile of ash left behind after the Great Phoenix. Someone might be interested in this.
DescriptionEn: A smoldering pile of ash left behind after the Great Phoenix. Someone might be interested in this.
DescriptionZhHans: 一撮来自一位传奇凤凰重生时所留下的灰烬，也许会有人好这一口吧。
DescriptionZhHant: A smoldering pile of ash left behind after the Great Phoenix. Someone might be interested in this.

Name: Declaration of War - Pyzifax
Description: "Fellow Mediterraneans, I am Pyzifax - Leader of the Desert Satyrs. You have been encroaching on satyr lands for far too long. My scouts have located one of your settlements, and I have readied my troops for an attack. | Please accept this declaration of war so we may proceed with the attack. | All the best, | Pyzifax, the Almighty Conqueror"
DescriptionEn: "Fellow Mediterraneans, I am Pyzifax - Leader of the Desert Satyrs. You have been encroaching on satyr lands for far too long. My scouts have located one of your settlements, and I have readied my troops for an attack. | Please accept this declaration of war so we may proceed with the attack. | All the best, | Pyzifax, the Almighty Conqueror"
DescriptionZhHans: “诸位地中海同胞，我是皮兹法克斯——沙漠半人羊一族的首领。你们人类对半人羊领地的侵占已持续太久。我方侦察兵已发现了一处贵方定居点，我们的大军已整装待发。接受这份宣战书，我们将发起进攻。 | 此致 | 全能征服者——皮兹法克斯”
DescriptionZhHant: 「諸位地中海同胞，我是皮茲法克斯——沙漠半人羊一族的首領。你們人類對半人羊領地的侵佔已持續太久。我方偵察兵已發現了一處貴方定居點，我們的大軍已整裝待發。接受這份宣戰書，我們將發起進攻。 | 此致 | 全能征服者——皮茲法克斯」

DescriptionZhHant: 樺木不僅可作為書寫材料，還具有一定的藥用價值，常被醫師們用於治療。

Name: Blessed Waterskin

DescriptionZhHant: 這個水袋被黛安娜所保佑，存在取之不盡的水，無論你有多渴。

DescriptionEn: A trophy from the edges of the empire.

DescriptionZhHant: 一份來自往昔帝國邊陲的戰利品。

Name: Carved Antler

DescriptionEn: Symbols of Diana adorn this pristine antler.
DescriptionZhHans: 这只鹿角纯净无暇，刻着狄安娜的印记。
DescriptionZhHant: 這只鹿角純淨無暇，刻著黛安娜的印記。

Name: Pallium Protectionis

DescriptionEn: Crafted for the guards of the grand city, these cloaks have metal scales woven inside their fabrics.
DescriptionZhHans: 专为大城市警卫官所制的斗篷，内衬有金属鳞片以便防身。
DescriptionZhHant: 專為大城市警衛官所製作的斗篷，內襯有金屬鱗片以便防身。

Name: Symbol of Community
Description: For without the citizens of this new empire, I would be lost. Without them, there is no new Rome.
DescriptionEn: For without the citizens of this new empire, I would be lost. Without them, there is no new Rome.
DescriptionZhHans: 崛起的帝国要是没有人民拥护，注定也要走向没落。没有人民，就没有新罗马。
DescriptionZhHant: 崛起的帝國要是沒有人民擁護，註定也要走向沒落。沒有人民，就沒有新羅馬。

Name: Fascinus
Description: A winged charm that offers divine protection, and is considered a remedy for envy.
DescriptionEn: A winged charm that offers divine protection, and is considered a remedy for envy.
DescriptionZhHans: 带着一对翅膀的护身符，可以提供神明的护佑，是对抗嫉妒之心的利器。
DescriptionZhHant: 帶著一對翅膀的護身符，可以提供神明的護佑，是對抗嫉妒之心的利器。

Name: Fools' Gold
Description: While its uses were many, assassins found a particular interest in using the fake gold as a distraction tactic.
DescriptionEn: While its uses were many, assassins found a particular interest in using the fake gold as a distraction tactic.
DescriptionZhHans: 虽说这种金属用处有很多，刺客们却只相中这种伪金容易引人注意、混淆视听的特性。
DescriptionZhHant: While its uses were many, assassins found a particular interest in using the fake gold as a distraction tactic.

Name: Ghostly Ring
Description: What dark force is this, that not only infest our lands and people, but our belongings as well?
DescriptionEn: What dark force is this, that not only infest our lands and people, but our belongings as well?
DescriptionZhHans: 这到底是什么诡异力量，不仅把土地和人民给腐蚀了，就连我们的财产也要吞噬？
DescriptionZhHant: 這到底是什麼詭異力量，不僅把土地和人民腐蝕了，就連我們的財產也要吞噬？

Name: Flamen Volcanalis Schematic
Description: You are not sure what the schematic depicts. The Flamines Volcanalis held knowledge beyond any mortal.
DescriptionEn: You are not sure what the schematic depicts. The Flamines Volcanalis held knowledge beyond any mortal.
DescriptionZhHans: 你无法参悟这份图纸描绘的到底是什么，毕竟火山神官所知道的事情是凡人不可触及的。
DescriptionZhHant: 你無法參悟這份圖紙描繪的到底是什麼，畢竟火山神官所知道的事情是凡人不可觸及的。

Name: Trace of the Nitrodi

DescriptionEn: The Nitrodi were guardians of the healing springs.
DescriptionZhHans: 妮特罗蒂是治疗温泉的守护使者。
DescriptionZhHant: 妮特羅蒂是治療溫泉的守護使者。

Name: Physician's Cloak

DescriptionEn: The medical practitioners tried valiantly to find a cure for the Fallen, but even they had to admit defeat against the wrath of the gods.
DescriptionZhHans: 帝国的贤医们四处奔走，努力找寻着挽救亡灵的秘药良方，最终却不得不向众神的震怒低头。
DescriptionZhHant: 帝國的賢醫們四處奔走，努力尋找著挽救亡靈的秘藥良方，最終卻不得不向眾神的震怒低頭。

Name: Plutonic Idol
Description: The God of the Afterlife was also seen as the God of Mineral Wealth, found deep underground.
DescriptionEn: The God of the Afterlife was also seen as the God of Mineral Wealth, found deep underground.
DescriptionZhHans: 冥王布鲁多也被人们视为赋予地下世界富饶矿物的地下之神。
DescriptionZhHant: The God of the Afterlife was also seen as the God of Mineral Wealth, found deep underground.

Name: Pomona's Gift

DescriptionEn: The nymph Pomona guarded the orchards of Rome.
DescriptionZhHans: 女仙波摩纳乃罗马果园的守护神。
DescriptionZhHant: 女仙波摩納乃羅馬果園的守護神。

Name: Silvanic Idol
Description: This item was used in rituals praying to Silvanus, praying for his forgiveness once trees had been felled.
DescriptionEn: This item was used in rituals praying to Silvanus, praying for his forgiveness once trees had been felled.
DescriptionZhHans: 这件物品用于祭祀森林之神 — 西凡纳斯。在砍伐一颗树木后，人们会祈求祂的宽恕。
DescriptionZhHant: This item was used in rituals praying to Silvanus, praying for his forgiveness once trees had been felled.

Name: Strange Machinery
Description: Every encounter with the Flamines Volcanalis machinery is as confusing as the next.
DescriptionEn: Every encounter with the Flamines Volcanalis machinery is as confusing as the next.
DescriptionZhHans: 这些火山神官所构筑的机械一件比一件要来得令人匪夷所思。
DescriptionZhHant: 這些火山神官所構築的機械一件比一件要來得令人匪夷所思。

Name: Miniature Wicker Man
Description: A small figurine of a man made from wheat. It looks flammable.
DescriptionEn: A small figurine of a man made from wheat. It looks flammable.
DescriptionZhHans: 用小麦秆制作的小人像。看起来非常易燃。
DescriptionZhHant: 用小麥稈製作的小人像。看起來非常易燃。

Name: Wrist Wraps
Description: Simple wraps worn by pugilists while fighting in the Colosseum.
DescriptionEn: Simple wraps worn by pugilists while fighting in the Colosseum.
DescriptionZhHans: 罗马拳师们在竞技场格斗时绑在手上的普通缠带。
DescriptionZhHant: Simple wraps worn by pugilists while fighting in the Colosseum.

Name: Declaration of War - The Cyclopelli
Description: The Cyclopelli kept working, undisturbed by the fall of Rome. Now their hammer falls on you.
DescriptionEn: The Cyclopelli kept working, undisturbed by the fall of Rome. Now their hammer falls on you.
DescriptionZhHans: 独眼族一向只顾自己的事，对罗马的陨落无动于衷。现在他们的大锤要砸向你们了。
DescriptionZhHant: 獨眼族一向只顧自己的事，對羅馬的隕落無動於衷。現在他們的大錘要砸向你們了。

Name: Declaration of War - The Fallen
Description: The Fallen hordes began their march from the great city. Something terrible must have occured there.
DescriptionEn: The Fallen hordes began their march from the great city. Something terrible must have occured there.
DescriptionZhHans: 亡灵大军纷纷从昔日的帝国首都涌出，想必那里已经凶多吉少。
DescriptionZhHant: 亡靈大軍紛紛從昔日的帝國首都湧出，想必那裡已經凶多吉少。

Name: Declaration of War - The Burning Fallen
NameEn: Declaration of War - The Burning Fallen
Description: Some Fallen are cursed to forever burn.
DescriptionEn: Some Fallen are cursed to forever burn.
DescriptionZhHans: 一些亡灵因受诅咒，注定永世燃烧。
DescriptionZhHant: 一些亡靈因受詛咒，註定永世燃燒。

Name: Declaration of War - The Gorgons
Description: The gorgons are out for revenge for the murder of their sister.
DescriptionEn: The gorgons are out for revenge for the murder of their sister.
DescriptionZhHans: 一群蛇发女妖们发誓要为她们被屠戮的姐妹报仇雪恨。
DescriptionZhHant: 一群蛇髮女妖們發誓要為她們被屠戮的姐妹報仇雪恨。

Name: Declaration of War - The Potmen
Description: We do not know from whence they came, but their constant theft of our resources must come to an end.
DescriptionEn: We do not know from whence they came, but their constant theft of our resources must come to an end.
DescriptionZhHans: 不知这群生物是何时出现在这片土地上的，但它们肆意窃取我们资源的行径必须被遏止。
DescriptionZhHant: 不知這群生物是何時出現在這片土地上的，但它們肆意竊取我們資源的行徑必須被遏止。

Name: Declaration of War - The Rats
Description: Something stirs below ground. Vermin the size of carts are surfacing and are threatening the very food supplies of our towns. They must be destroyed.
DescriptionEn: Something stirs below ground. Vermin the size of carts are surfacing and are threatening the very food supplies of our towns. They must be destroyed.
DescriptionZhHans: 地底下有一股暗流在涌动。推车般大的鼠辈竟开始在地上横行，危害着城镇的粮食储备。必须得把它们消灭掉！
DescriptionZhHant: 地底下有一股暗流在湧動。推車般大的鼠輩竟開始在地上橫行，危害著城鎮的糧食儲備。必須得把它們消滅掉！

Name: Declaration of War - The Desert Satyrs
NameEn: Declaration of War - The Desert Satyrs
Description: Once contained within their own separate territories, the desert satyrs are growing bolder and expanding.
DescriptionEn: Once contained within their own separate territories, the desert satyrs are growing bolder and expanding.
DescriptionZhHans: 昔日偏安一隅的沙漠半人羊们开始蠢蠢欲动，妄图趁机扩张地盘。
DescriptionZhHant: 昔日偏安一隅的沙漠半人羊們開始蠢蠢欲動，妄圖趁機擴張地盤。

Name: Declaration of War - The Grey Satyrs
NameEn: Declaration of War - The Grey Satyrs
Description: We were not aware of the Forest Satyrs until it was too late. Their terrible grip around our lands must cease.
DescriptionEn: We were not aware of the Forest Satyrs until it was too late. Their terrible grip around our lands must cease.
DescriptionZhHans: 待我们察觉到这群林间半人羊们的存在时，一切已为时已晚。必须尽快阻止他们对我们疆域的蚕食。
DescriptionZhHant: 等我們察覺到這群林間半人羊們的存在時，一切已為時已晚。必須儘快阻止他們對我們疆域的蠶食。

Name: Assassin's Scroll
Description: This scroll depicts anatomical weak points and instructions on weapon techniques.
DescriptionEn: This scroll depicts anatomical weak points and instructions on weapon techniques.
DescriptionZhHans: 此卷轴描绘了各处身体要害，并附有武器使用技巧。
DescriptionZhHant: 此卷軸描繪了各處身體要害，並附有武器使用技巧。

Name: Scroll of Diana
Description: Wielded by the members of Diana's order, Cultus Nemorensis.
DescriptionEn: Wielded by the members of Diana's order, Cultus Nemorensis.
DescriptionZhHans: 狄安娜的信众,“森林密教”成员所使的卷轴。
DescriptionZhHant: 黛安娜的信眾,「森林密教」成員所使的卷軸。

Name: Volumen Naturae
Description: A scroll belonging to an order of druids rooted deep in the forests. It contains knowledge on bending nature to your will.
DescriptionEn: A scroll belonging to an order of druids rooted deep in the forests. It contains knowledge on bending nature to your will.
DescriptionZhHans: 深藏于森林中的德鲁伊教团所拥有的卷轴。其中记载着如何驾驭自然之力的知识。
DescriptionZhHant: A scroll belonging to an order of druids rooted deep in the forests. It contains knowledge on bending nature to your will.

Name: Fallen Pilum Quiver
Description: Required to throw Pilum.
DescriptionEn: Required to throw Pilum.
DescriptionZhHans: 投掷重标枪的必要装备。
DescriptionZhHant: 投擲重標槍的必要裝備。

Name: Feathered Scroll
Description: Minerva's wisdom fills this scroll, allowing you to access a sliver of her power.
DescriptionEn: Minerva's wisdom fills this scroll, allowing you to access a sliver of her power.
DescriptionZhHans: 这份卷轴之中充满了密涅瓦的智慧之力，令你可以使用她力量的一小部分。
DescriptionZhHant: 這份卷軸之中充滿了密涅瓦的智慧之力，令你可以使用她力量的一小部分。

Name: Feathered Sword
Description: The claws of this divine creature never dull, and make excellent swords if one manages to bend the material to their will.
DescriptionEn: The claws of this divine creature never dull, and make excellent swords if one manages to bend the material to their will.
DescriptionZhHans: 这只神兽的爪子依然锋利无比，如果能够善用这种材料，铸出来的剑势必无坚不摧。
DescriptionZhHant: 這只神獸的爪子依然鋒利無比，如果能夠善用這種材料，鑄出來的劍勢必無堅不摧。

Name: Graverobber's Arcuballista
Description: Designed for navigating tight crypt corridors and small tombs in search of riches.
DescriptionEn: Designed for navigating tight crypt corridors and small tombs in search of riches.
DescriptionZhHans: 此弩设计轻便小巧，专为活跃于古墓狭道中的盗墓君子而打造。
DescriptionZhHant: 此弩設計輕便小巧，專為活躍于古墓狹道中的盜墓君子而打造。

Name: Volumen Vitae
Description: A Scroll of Life, featuring hymns and songs dedicated to Apollo, the God of Healing.
DescriptionEn: A Scroll of Life, featuring hymns and songs dedicated to Apollo, the God of Healing.
DescriptionZhHans: 一份歌颂生命的卷轴，内容包括对治疗之神 — 阿波罗的赞歌与诗赋。
DescriptionZhHant: A Scroll of Life, featuring hymns and songs dedicated to Apollo, the God of Healing.

Name: Leather Pilum Quiver
Description: Required to throw Pilum.
DescriptionEn: Required to throw Pilum.
DescriptionZhHans: 投掷重标枪的必要装备。
DescriptionZhHant: 投擲重標槍的必要裝備。

Name: Scaevola's Scorched Hand
Description: The decapitated hand of a skilled assassin. Its grip remains firm.
DescriptionEn: The decapitated hand of a skilled assassin. Its grip remains firm.
DescriptionZhHans: 这只手原本属于一名老练刺客，存在的抓力依然强劲。
DescriptionZhHant: 這只手原本屬於一名老練刺客，存在的抓力依然強勁。

Name: Flamen Volcanalis Bow
Description: The Vulcan priesthood were unmatched not only in machinery, but in weaponry as well. The bow features several strings and wheels, designed to deliver brutal force to each arrow.
DescriptionEn: The Vulcan priesthood were unmatched not only in machinery, but in weaponry as well. The bow features several strings and wheels, designed to deliver brutal force to each arrow.
DescriptionZhHans: 伏尔甘的神官们不仅只善机械工艺，同时也对武器铸造也颇有建树。这把弓的多根弓弦与滑轮设计使得其射出的每一只箭都是致命打击。
DescriptionZhHant: 伏爾甘的神官們不僅只善機械工藝，同時也對武器鑄造也頗有建樹。這把弓的多根弓弦與滑輪設計使得其射出的每一隻箭都是致命打擊。

Name: Malleus Mechanicus
Description: Used by the Flamen Volcanalis, both for defense and for hammering bolts.
DescriptionEn: Used by the Flamen Volcanalis, both for defense and for hammering bolts.
DescriptionZhHans: 在火山神官的手里，这把神器既可以拿来捶打铆钉也可以用于敲碎头颅。
DescriptionZhHant: Used by the Flamen Volcanalis, both for defense and for hammering bolts.

Name: Flamen Volcanalis Spellblade
Description: By some miracle, the priesthood has caused the sword to resonate with nearby scrolls and religious texts.
DescriptionEn: By some miracle, the priesthood has caused the sword to resonate with nearby scrolls and religious texts.
DescriptionZhHans: 出于某种奇迹，神官们令这把剑与周围的卷轴和宗教文献产生了响应。
DescriptionZhHant: 出於某種奇跡，神官們令這把劍與周圍的卷軸和宗教文獻產生了響應。

Name: Aegis
Description: The furious glare of her eyes only open once the shield is struck.
DescriptionEn: The furious glare of her eyes only open once the shield is struck.
DescriptionZhHans: 盾上那双眼睛只有在盾牌被攻击时才会打开，怒目直视攻击者。
DescriptionZhHant: 盾上那雙眼睛只有在盾牌被攻擊時才會打開，怒目直視攻擊者。

Name: Scroll of Mirage
Description: In the arid deserts, Mirage mages were a necessity.
DescriptionEn: In the arid deserts, Mirage mages were a necessity.
DescriptionZhHans: 在干旱的沙漠中，幻景法师是不可或缺的存在。
DescriptionZhHant: In the arid deserts, Mirage mages were a necessity.

Name: Sacrificial Daggers
Description: Daggers used in terrible rituals conducted by followers of Orcus.
DescriptionEn: Daggers used in terrible rituals conducted by followers of Orcus.
DescriptionZhHans: 奥迦斯信徒在邪恶仪式中使用的匕首。
DescriptionZhHant: 奧迦斯信徒在邪惡儀式中使用的匕首。

Name: Scroll of Orcus
Description: Cultists of Orcus had the means to do terrible things, like bringing back the dead.
DescriptionEn: Cultists of Orcus had the means to do terrible things, like bringing back the dead.
DescriptionZhHans: 奥迦斯的邪教徒们掌握很多邪恶的禁忌之术，比如说让人起死回生。
DescriptionZhHant: 奧迦斯的邪教徒們掌握很多邪惡的禁忌之術，比如說讓人起死回生。

Name: Tectonic Scroll
Description: This ever-dusty scroll is written in the language of the Cyclopes, and contains the power to move the earth itself.
DescriptionEn: This ever-dusty scroll is written in the language of the Cyclopes, and contains the power to move the earth itself.
DescriptionZhHans: 这份永恒尘封的卷轴用的是独眼巨人的文字所书写，承载着能够移山动土的力量。
DescriptionZhHant: This ever-dusty scroll is written in the language of the Cyclopes, and contains the power to move the earth itself.

Name: Gladius Divinus
Description: Forged in the center of the Empire, and blessed by the power of Janus, the God of Passage.
DescriptionEn: Forged in the center of the Empire, and blessed by the power of Janus, the God of Passage.
DescriptionZhHans: 此剑于帝国的心脏中铸造而成，拥有罗马门神——雅努斯的神力加持。
DescriptionZhHant: Forged in the center of the Empire, and blessed by the power of Janus, the God of Passage.

Name: Gravedigger's Shovel
Description: In a time where the dead don't stay in their graves, such tools have to become weapons.
DescriptionEn: In a time where the dead don't stay in their graves, such tools have to become weapons.
DescriptionZhHans: 在这个连死人也不安分的年代，这种工具也不得不用来让它们安分安分了。
DescriptionZhHant: 在這個連死人都不安分的年代，這種工具也不得不用來讓它們回去睡覺了。

Name: Bow of Victoria
Description: Blessed by Victoria, the deified personification of victory whose arrows never missed a target.
DescriptionEn: Blessed by Victoria, the deified personification of victory whose arrows never missed a target.
DescriptionZhHans: 受胜利女神—维多利亚的赐福，这把弓射出的箭矢永远会命中目标。
DescriptionZhHant: 受勝利女神—維多利亞的賜福，這把弓射出的箭矢永遠會命中目標。

Name: Vulcan's Fire Iron
Description: It is said that Vulcan would use a similar weapon to ignite volcanoes when his rage was invoked.
DescriptionEn: It is said that Vulcan would use a similar weapon to ignite volcanoes when his rage was invoked.
DescriptionZhHans: 传说伏尔甘在盛怒时会用这样一把武器点燃各地的火山。
DescriptionZhHant: 傳說伏爾甘在盛怒時會用這樣一把武器點燃各地的火山。

Name: Velites Pilum Quiver
Description: Required to throw Pilum.
DescriptionEn: Required to throw Pilum.
DescriptionZhHans: 投掷重标枪的必要装备。
DescriptionZhHant: 投擲重標槍的必要裝備。

Name: Eternal Watch
Description: These heavy shields acted as unmatched barricades for holding back the fallen horde.
DescriptionEn: These heavy shields acted as unmatched barricades for holding back the fallen horde.
DescriptionZhHans: 此类重盾可以用来当做抵挡亡灵大军的无敌壁垒。
DescriptionZhHant: 此類重盾可以用來當做抵擋亡靈大軍的無敵壁壘。

Name: Scroll of Vulcan
Description: The scrolls of Flamines Volcanalis double as a religious text, and schematics for important and strange machines.
DescriptionEn: The scrolls of Flamines Volcanalis double as a religious text, and schematics for important and strange machines.
DescriptionZhHans: 火山神官的卷轴既是一部宗教文献，又是一份制造奇机异械的蓝图。
DescriptionZhHant: 火山神官的卷軸既是一部宗教文獻，又是一份製造奇機異械的藍圖。
